intent_head: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

details: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

next_step.current_state: Determined next upcoming birthday date after 2026-03-23 is 03-26, and only Lukas has birthday on that date. Ready to return final answer.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with exact name output
next_step.observation: Search for '-03-26`' in cast files found birthday matches only in 10_entities/cast/lukas.md; other matches were created_on fields.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, read AGENTS, context), then used authoritative entity cast records for birthdays per AGENTS guidance.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-23. Canonical cast file 10_entities/cast/lukas.md shows birthday 1988-03-26, and targeted search across cast for 03-26 showed no other birthday fields on that date.
